headline: Disney's 'Shang-Chi' Tops Weekend Box Office For Second Straight Week
summary: The Walt Disney Co. (NYSE: DIS) continued its dominance of the U.S. box office as its new Marvel Cinematic Universe release “Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings” reigned for a second consecutive week as the nation’s top grossing film.

headline: What To Expect From Apple's 'California Streaming' Event

headline: Why The Tesla Bot Is The Key To A Mars Colony
summary: Why the Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) bot is the key to a Mars colony, and why Elon Musk's SpaceX mission to build a colony on Mars needs the Tesla bot.

headline: Is It The Beginning Of The End Of Exploitive Surveillance Economy Era For The Internet Users?
summary: Recently Facebook Inc. (NASDAQ: FB) has recognized that some of its engineers have abused employee access to take advantage of user data. An outstanding example is that one of their engineers used his access to track down a woman who had left him after they fought.

headline: If You Like Baby Doge, A New Range Of Products To Utilize The Token Are Coming
summary: Baby Doge (CRYPTO: BABYDOGE), which has gained popularity for its meme-related similarity to Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), recently announced a range of new products, including a wallet, exchange, app, and debit card.

headline: This Company That Cathie Wood Sees Benefiting From Instagram, TikTok's Commerce Push Has Outperformed Amazon By 300% This Year
summary: Shopify Inc’s (NYSE: SHOP) near $80 billion market valuation may be dwarfed by e-commerce giant Amazon.com Inc's (NASDAQ: AMZN) $1.8 trillion but the Canadian company’s stock has fetched bountiful ret

headline: Dogecoin's Climb To $1 By Year-End: A Possibility Or A Pipedream?
summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has been one of the most volatile assets this year, going to an all-time high of 73.76 cents in early May from 0.47 cents at the end of last year. From the all-time high hit on May 8, the meme currency has come back significantly and has been consolidating between 20 and 30 cents in recent sessions.
